packageRules.description: Ungroup non-major deps that aren't covered by an explicit group below. Overrides the inherited 'all non-major' catch-all (from open-turo/renovate-config:jvm) so each ungrouped package gets its own PR for easier review and bisection. Must come first because Renovate applies packageRules in order — later rules win, so explicit groups below re-apply on top of this null.

Group Kotlin, KSP, and Compose compiler. Exclude kotlinx — it moves on a different cadence than the language itself and grouping causes unnecessary version locks. Patterns are anchored and dots escaped because Renovate treats matchPackagePatterns as regex.
Group Compose UI / Foundation / Animation / Material / Runtime libraries — they release together and almost always need to move in lockstep.
Group Ktor client/server submodules — :runtime, :oauth, and :samples:android all depend on Ktor and the submodules release in lockstep, so grouping avoids 5+ duplicate PRs per Ktor release.

Owned by .github/workflows/lexicon-bump.yaml. That workflow performs the full npm bump + npx lex install + :models regeneration in one PR; a Renovate-only npm bump would land lexicons.json out of sync and fail `npx lex install --ci` in CI.
Provide direct links to Gradle release notes in PRs.
